narrative:
Clark / Monroe / Tiverton (precinct in Coshocton County) has 857 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
